subtasks.description: Query licenses database to group by publisher and compute total contract value, average cost per seat, and count of licenses per publisher. Single SQL with GROUP BY and aggregation functions.

plan.cost_rationale: This is a straightforward single-source aggregation query with GROUP BY and standard aggregate functions (SUM, AVG, COUNT). No joins across multiple tables are indicated, no window functions required, and no cross-source reconciliation needed. A small-tier sql_gen is sufficient to produce the grouped licensing metrics in one call."

output.sql: SELECT publisher, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_contract_value, AVG(amount_usd / NULLIF(daily_active_seats, 0)) AS avg_cost_per_seat, COUNT(DISTINCT license_id) AS license_count FROM consumption_facts GROUP BY publisher ORDER BY total_contract_value DESC
